district_nexus = {
	base_buildtime = 480

	exempt_from_ai_planet_specialization = yes
	overlay_icon = GFX_district_government		#Steam: Ported from vanilla

	inline_script = { script = districts/BPV_district_slots GOVERNMENT = slot_city_government SLOT1 = slot_city_01 SLOT2 = slot_city_02 SLOT3 = slot_city_02 SLOT4 = slot_city_02 SLOT5 = slot_city_02 SLOT6 = slot_city_02 SLOT7 = slot_city_02 SLOT8 = slot_city_02 SLOT9 = slot_city_02 SLOT10 = slot_city_02 }

	# prerequisites = {
	# 	tech_industrial_city
	# }
	

	show_tech_unlock_if = {
		has_global_flag = ethic_civic_classic_active # EaC Mod flag
		is_machine_empire = yes
	}

	show_on_uncolonized = {
		exists = from
		from = { is_machine_empire = yes }
		OR = {
			uses_district_set = standard
			uses_district_set = volcanic_world
			uses_district_set = hive_world
			uses_district_set = machine_world
			uses_district_set = shattered_ring_world
		}
	}

	potential = {
		# EAC Mod Integration
		OR = {
			NOT = { has_global_flag = ethic_civic_classic_active } # No EaC Mod
			owner = { has_technology = tech_industrial_city } # Eac act
		}
		exists = owner
		owner = { is_machine_empire = yes }
		OR = {
			uses_district_set = standard
			uses_district_set = volcanic_world
			uses_district_set = hive_world
			uses_district_set = machine_world
			uses_district_set = shattered_ring_world
		}
		NAND = {
			is_capital = yes
			owner = {
				has_menace_perk = menp_behemoth_mind_meld
			}
		}
	}

	allow = {
		NOT = { has_modifier = resort_colony }
	}

	conversion_ratio = 1
	convert_to = {
		district_arcology_housing
        district_rw_nexus
        district_city
        district_hive
        district_craglands
        district_mindlink
        # AG Mod Integration
		################################# New Contents #################################
        district_ag_shell_world_housing
        district_ag_ancient_city_housing
        district_ag_ancient_city_wilderness
        district_ag_hive
        district_ag_ancient_hive_wilderness
        district_ag_nexus
		##############################################################################
	}

	# EPM Mod Integration
	resources = {
		category = planet_districts_cities
		cost = {
			minerals = @city_cost
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 2
		}
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
				has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			}
			waste = -50
		}
		upkeep = {
			energy = 1
			trigger = {
				has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
				has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			}
		}
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_housing_add = 1100
		# job_maintenance_drone_add = 300	# No Longer Used in Stellaris 4.0
		# planet_max_buildings_add = 1	# No Longer Used in Stellaris 4.0
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
			has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_regular_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_amenities_add = 300
			planet_housing_add = -200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_global_flag = ecology_pops_patch_flag
			has_deposit = d_eco_city_park
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_gestalt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_amenities_no_happiness_add = 300
			planet_housing_add = -200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				is_civic_avian_construction = yes
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 200
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_technology = tech_housing_1 }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 100
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_modifier = gestation_colony
		}
		modifier = {
			#job_maintenance_drone_add = -100
			job_gestation_drone_add = 100 	# No Longer Used in Stellaris 4.0 #Steam: Yes they are used in 4.0, un-tagging this and tagging the replacement maintenance drones
		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_technology = tech_housing_2 }
		}
		modifier = {
			planet_housing_add = 100

		}
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = { is_tankbound_empire = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			job_production_overseer_add = 100
		}
